Item 2.Properties.
The Company’s corporate headquarters is currently located in [LOCATION], [LOCATION]. The Company has previously announced that it intends to consolidate its [LOCATION] campuses into a single corporate headquarters location in [LOCATION], [LOCATION] by [DATE_TIME] 2023. The Company also maintains operational or divisional headquarters in [LOCATION], [LOCATION]; [LOCATION], [LOCATION] and [LOCATION], [LOCATION]. Principal [LOCATION] research facilities are located in [LOCATION] and [LOCATION], [LOCATION]; [LOCATION], [LOCATION]; [LOCATION], [LOCATION]; [LOCATION], [LOCATION]; and [LOCATION], [LOCATION] (Animal Health). Principal research facilities outside [LOCATION] are located in [LOCATION], [LOCATION] and [LOCATION]. Merck’s manufacturing operations are currently headquartered in Whitehouse Station, [LOCATION]. The Company also has production facilities for human health products at nine locations in [LOCATION] and [LOCATION]. Outside [LOCATION], through subsidiaries, the Company owns or has an interest in manufacturing plants or other properties in [LOCATION], [LOCATION], [LOCATION], and other countries in [LOCATION], [LOCATION], and [LOCATION]. A number of properties will be transferred to Organon in the Spin-Off.
Capital expenditures were [SALARY].7 billion in [DATE_TIME], [SALARY].5 billion in [DATE_TIME] and [SALARY].6 billion in [DATE_TIME]. In [LOCATION], these amounted to [SALARY].7 billion in [DATE_TIME], [SALARY].9 billion in [DATE_TIME] and [SALARY].5 billion in [DATE_TIME]. Abroad, such expenditures amounted to [SALARY].0 billion in [DATE_TIME], [SALARY].6 billion in [DATE_TIME], and [SALARY].1 billion in [DATE_TIME].
The Company and its subsidiaries own their principal facilities and manufacturing plants under titles that they consider to be satisfactory. The Company believes that its properties are in good operating condition and that its machinery and equipment have been well maintained. The Company believes that its plants for the manufacture of products are suitable for their intended purposes and have capacities and projected capacities, including previously-disclosed capital expansion projects, that will be adequate for current and projected needs for existing Company products. Some capacity of the plants is being converted, with any needed modification, to the requirements of newly introduced and future products.
Item 3.
